name: ORKIO OS Landing & Executive Positioning Foundation

hero.headline: Your business does not need more answers. It needs better decisions.
hero.subheadline: Orkio is a Cognitive Operating System that helps people and organizations understand complex problems, structure decisions, preserve context, and transform strategy into execution.
